name: localwatermark
description: Nextcloud extension for client-side secure PDF watermarking with Local WebWorkers

scripts.build: vite build && cp node_modules/pdfjs-dist/build/pdf.worker.mjs js/pdf.worker.js 2>/dev/null || cp node_modules/pdfjs-dist/build/pdf.worker.min.js js/pdf.worker.js 2>/dev/null || true
